name: Rapid Retrieval
description: A thrown weapon gains the Returning tag, letting it come back to the wielder after being thrown.
notes: Simple passive enhancement.

name: Basic Elemental Infusion
description: Choose Water, Fire, Earth, or Wind; attacks made with the weapon gain that elemental tag and its related effects.
notes: See Elemental Subsystem for exact effects.

name: Extended Reach
description: A melee weapon's attack range increases beyond normal melee reach.
notes: Increase the weapon's reach by 1 square; use normalized reach wording in export/display.

name: Enhanced Targeting
description: The weapon is easier to line up for careful shots.
notes: Gain an additional +1D status bonus when taking the Aim action.

name: Agile Weapon
description: The weapon is balanced for speed and finesse rather than brute force.
notes: Attack rolls and damage use Agility instead of Strength.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: The weapon is infused with spirit energy so it strikes at the soul instead of the body.
notes: Attacks made with the weapon target Spiritual Defense instead of Physical Defense.

name: Weighted
description: The weapon is deliberately built heavier to hit harder.
notes: Attacks deal +2 damage on a success, but the weapon gains the Heavy tag.

name: Lightweight
description: The weapon is made from a lighter material without losing its edge or durability.
notes: The weapon loses the "Heavy" tag.

name: Defensive
description: The weapon is specially built to block and deflect incoming blows.
notes: The weapon gains the "Defensive" tag.

name: Armor Piercing
description: The weapon is designed to punch through defensive gear and protective equipment.
notes: This weapon ignores Equipment Bonuses to defenses.

name: Shapeshifting Weapon
description: The weapon can switch between multiple forms to suit the situation.
notes: Has 3 forms: 1 inconspicuous non-weapon form and 2 distinct weapon forms.

name: Swiss-Army Weapon
description: The weapon includes an integrated tool or utility function beyond combat use.
notes: Choose a utility skill; gain +1 Equipment bonus to checks using that skill while wielding the weapon.

name: Bane Weapon
description: The weapon is especially deadly against a chosen kind of enemy.
notes: Deals +2 damage against enemies with a chosen trait, such as Spirit.

name: High-Impact Ammunition
description: The weapon fires rounds that hit with enough force to shove targets backward.
notes: On hit, enemies are also pushed back; distance increases at higher ranks.

name: Instant Retrieval
description: A thrown weapon can be recalled to the wielder's hand immediately after it is thrown.
notes: Recall requires no action.

name: Size Changing / Extending
description: The weapon can grow, shrink, or elongate to fit the needs of the moment.
notes: Draft-level entry; intended to increase size/reach, possibly with drawbacks in tight spaces.

name: Sentient Weapon
description: The weapon is alive or self-aware and can communicate with its wielder.
notes: May speak aloud or communicate telepathically.

name: Heart-Seeker
description: The weapon is unusually precise at striking vital openings.
notes: Attacks with this weapon score a critical hit if they exceed the TN by 2 or more.

name: Energy Drain
description: The weapon siphons energy during combat and feeds it back to its wielder.
notes: Absorbs energy on hit, or when used to defend against attacks.

name: Freeze Beam
description: The weapon can project a line of freezing cold in addition to its normal attacks.
notes: Rank of Ice equals the weapon's skill rank minus 1; area increases at higher ranks.

name: Lightning Launcher
description: The weapon can project a line of lightning in addition to its normal attacks.
notes: Handbook text appears to contain a copy/paste typo; likely intended to use Lightning rather than Ice.

name: Flamethrowing Weapon
description: The weapon can spew flame in a line or cone as an additional attack mode.
notes: Rank of Flame equals the weapon's skill rank minus 1; area increases at higher ranks.

name: Explosive Ammunition
description: The weapon fires ammunition that detonates on impact.
notes: Deals damage to nearby creatures around the point of impact.

name: Beast Bullets
description: The weapon fires spiritual creatures as ammunition to attack enemies.
notes: Example given: Caster Shell #5 from Outlaw Star.

name: Titan Weapon
description: The weapon is massively oversized and built for truly gigantic force.
notes: Draft-level entry with minimal defined mechanics.

name: Autonomous Weapon
description: The weapon can act and attack on its own without being directly wielded.
notes: Draft-level entry with minimal defined mechanics.

name: Gravity Weapon
description: The weapon manipulates gravity to empower swings and pull or repel enemies.
notes: Draft-level entry; combines swing enhancement with attraction/repulsion effects.

name: Seismic Weapon
description: A heavy weapon that creates shockwaves, tremors, and fissures in the ground.
notes: Draft-level entry with minimal defined mechanics.

name: Black Hole Shooter
description: The weapon fires miniature black holes as devastating projectiles.
notes: Draft-level entry with minimal defined mechanics.

name: Conceptual Weapon
description: The weapon attacks a target on a deeper metaphysical level rather than only harming the body.
notes: Draft-level entry; handbook notes ideas like attacking a target's "name," "identity," or "existence."
